calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2026 Continued To Aug-05-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ariel A. Pytel, Esq., TOWER LEGAL GROUP, P.C. (916) 361-6009 ariel.pytel@towerlegalgroup.com Attorneys for Plaintiff RENEE HESSELGREN

Sabrina Hernandez, Esq. / Angela Han, Esq., FENNEMORE LLP (510) 834-6600 Attorneys for Defendants True Wind Capital Management, L.P., True Wind Capital Management GP, LLC, True Wind Capital GP, LLC, True Wind Capital GP II, LLC, True Wind Capital, L.P., True Wind Capital II, L.P., and True Wind Capital II-A, L.P.

Hearing Held. ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Defendants True Wind Capital Management, L.P. ("TWCM"); True Wind Capital Management GP, LLC; True Wind Capital GP, LLC; True Wind Capital GP II, LLC; True Wind Capital, L.P.; True Wind Capital II, L.P.; and True Wind Capital II-A, L.P.'s demurrer to Plaintiff Renee Hesselgren's First Amended Complaint (FAC) is overruled as to Hesselgren's theories of agency and alter ego and sustained with leave to amend as to Causes of Action 3, 4, 5, and 10.

[SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING}

Proposed order submitted.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
